data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a full audit trail from posted demand to bid set to awarded assignment. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. Specifically, there is no evidence of a staffing demand being created or linked to an auction, which is essential for establishing the audit trail as outlined in the linked use case.
gaps: No evidence of a full audit trail from posted demand to awarded assignment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
